creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
Created attachment 253421
Patch security/vuxml/vuln/2024.xml to add recent minio vulnerabilities

Three months ago I submitted a VuXML patch for www/minio.  I am submitting the same patch here as requested on freebsd-ports at https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2024-September/006634.html

To apply the patch, please run `git am vuxml_minio_commit`.
